title: hieracium froelichianum subsp. laricicola
intro: Hieracium froelichianum subsp. laricicola is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is also known as Hawkweed or Hieracium. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium froelichianum subsp. laricicola include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in poultices and salves to apply topically for wound healing and skin issues.
